person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Robert fitzRoger (died 1310), Lord of Warkworth, Clavering and Eure, was an English baron. He was a son of Roger FitzJohn and Isabel de Dunbar. FitzRoger fought in the wars in Wales, Gascony and Scotland.

«b»Life«/b»
FitzRoger was the son of Roger fitzJohn, who held Warkworth Castle and was lord of Warkworth, Clavering and Eure. Roger died in 1249, leaving his son in infancy. FitzRoger was placed into the guardianship of William de Valence, although FitzRoger's grandmother Ada de Baillol, offered to buy the wardship of her grandson. In the right of his mother, FitzRoger obtained the barony of Blythburgh, Suffolk.

A distinguished soldier, FitzRoger fought in wars in Wales in 1277, 1282 and 1283, the wars against Scotland in 1291 until 1309 and in Gascony in 1294. He was summoned to the English Parliament of 1295 as Lord FitzRoger. During the battle of Stirling Bridge in 1297, fitzRoger was captured. He was a joint Captain of the Scotch Marches from November 1297. FitzRoger fought with his son John at the battle of Falkirk in 1298 and the siege of Caerlaverock in 1300. FitzRoger signed the Barons' Letter of 1301. He conducted a foray with John de Segrave from Berwick in 1302, and fought at the battle of Methven in 1306. He died in 1310.

«b»Marriage and issue«/b»
FitzRoger married Margaret de la Zouch, the daughter of Alan de la Zouche and Ellen de Quincy and had the following know issue:

1.) John de Clavering (died 1332), married Hawise de Tybetot, had issue.

2.) Euphemia de Clavering (died 1329), married Ralph Neville, 1st Baron Neville de Raby.

3.) Elizabeth de Clavering, married John De Mauteby, had issue.

4.) Robert de Clavering

5.) Alexander de Clavering, married Joan de Burgh, with no legitimate issue.

6.) Henry de Clavering

7.) Roger de Clavering, married Beatrice of unknown parentage, had issue.

8.) Allan de Callaly, married Isabella Riddell, had issue.

9.) Edmund de Clavering

10.) Ellen de Clavering, married John Engaine, with no legitimate issue.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert FitzRoger Clavering於大約1235年出生在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登時，他的父親Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering10歲，母親Isabel Dunbar12歲。他於1265年與Baroness Margery La Zouche結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1310年4月29日在英國艾可可拉維林享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Clavering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name; the Essex name is from Clavering (Essex), but in NE England it is probably from Clavering near Wooler (Northumb).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert FitzRoger Clavering was born about 1235, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, his father, Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering, was 10 and his mother, Isabel Dunbar, was 12. He married Baroness Margery La Zouche in 1265. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 29 April 1310, in Clavering, Essex, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert FitzRoger Clavering est né environ 1235, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Isabel Dunbar, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Margery La Zouche en 1265. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1310, à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert FitzRoger Clavering um 1235 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering 10 und seine Mutter Isabel Dunbar 12. Er hat 1265 Baroness Margery La Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 29. April 1310 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Clavering, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRoger Clavering è nato il circa 1235 nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England, il suo padre, Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering, aveva 10 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Dunbar, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Margery La Zouche nel 1265. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 29 aprile 1310, nel Clavering, Essex, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRoger Claveringが約1235年にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで生まれた時，父Lord Roger FitzJohn de Claveringは10歳，母Isabel Dunbarは12歳であった。1265年にBaroness Margery La Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1310年4月29日にイギリスエセックスクラバーイングで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRoger Clavering(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering(은)는 10세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Dunbar(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1265년 Baroness Margery La Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 4월 29일 영국 에세스 클레이버링에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRoger Clavering nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Dunbar, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Margery La Zouche em 1265. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1310, em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert FitzRoger Clavering родился около 1235 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Dunbar, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Margery La Zouche в 1265 г. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 29 апреля 1310 г. в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert FitzRoger Clavering nació aproximadamente 1235, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Isabel Dunbar, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Baroness Margery La Zouche en 1265. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 29 de abril de 1310, en Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
